scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:android-web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
